findings.description: Section s1 has content 'なし' (2 characters), which is far below the 50-character threshold. The section also has an empty string title. This appears to be a structural placeholder with no substantive content.
findings.source_evidence: The source file has no pre-title content before the document heading 'Java11で使用する場合のセットアップ方法'. There is no corresponding source content that would map to a standalone s1 section.
